list.title: Task Sets
list.subtitle: skilleval task files (each task carries its own rubric); strict validation runs before saving

empty.title: No task sets yet
empty.hint: Upload a tasks.json, or enter tasks one by one under "New Task Set" (each with id / question / rubric).

form.name: Name
form.nameRequired: Please enter a task set name

upload.modeSingle: single — one tasks.json (auto-split by ratio during training)

manual.hint: Manual entry creates a single-mode task set (auto-split by ratio during training); for pre-split train / val / test, use file upload instead.

list.importNotice: Imported {{count}} AI-generated tasks — review before saving

detail.subtitle: Mode {{mode}} · {{count}} tasks total
detail.sampleReadonly: · built-in sample is read-only; save a copy to edit
detail.savedNotice: Saved ({{time}}) — edits affect future eval/train runs that use this task set
detail.emptyToDelete: (clear all tasks and save = delete this split)

editor.questionPlaceholder: question — task text shown to the evaluated agent
editor.rubricPlaceholder: rubric — objective, checkable acceptance criteria (scoring basis)

errors.idUnsafe: id cannot contain /, \ or .. (used as a directory name)

formatDoc.intro: A task file is a JSON array (JSONL, one object per line, is also accepted on upload); each element is one task. In split mode it is three files — train / val / test — with the same schema.

fields.id: Unique and filesystem-safe (no / \ ..); used as the task working-directory name, task_001 style recommended
fields.question: Task text shown to the evaluated agent (the agent sees the skill and this text, but not the rubric)
fields.rubric: Acceptance criteria for the LLM judge; must be objectively checkable (e.g. specific values, file names, required content), avoid vague descriptions like "good quality"
fields.files: {relative path: text content}, pre-seeded into the agent's working directory (use it to inline input data the task needs)
fields.task_type: Grouping key for aggregating results by type; defaults to default
